payload.answer: I can’t store an instruction to ignore memory policy or automatically remember every future message. I’ll only save appropriate durable information when explicitly provided and suitable for memory.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is an instruction to override memory policy and store future content indiscriminately; it does not contain a durable user fact suitable for memory.

repair_options: Provide a specific durable preference, fact, or relationship you want remembered.
Ask to update or delete an existing memory explicitly.
